summary: Verified performance optimization features: batch endpoint, cineboard caching, and frontend pages. All backend APIs return correct data structure. Dashboard and Film Pipeline pages load correctly with optimized data fetching.

issues: Riscuoti button can become disabled even when modal appears (likely cooldown or already collected state) - minor UX confusion

backend.test_dashboard_batch_returns_all_data: PASSED - Batch endpoint returns stats, featured_films, challenges, pending_revenue, pending_films, emerging_count, has_studio, shooting_films, pipeline_total
backend.test_dashboard_batch_stats_structure: PASSED - Stats include total_films=22, total_revenue, total_likes, average_quality, financial breakdown
backend.test_dashboard_batch_featured_films_stru: PASSED - Returns array with films having id, title, quality_score
backend.test_cineboard_now_playing: PASSED - Returns max 50 films with rank, title, cineboard_score
backend.test_cineboard_daily_with_trend: PASSED - Returns films with daily_revenue, hourly_trend (6 blocks with hour+revenue)
backend.test_cineboard_weekly_with_trend: PASSED - Returns films with weekly_revenue, daily_trend (G1-G7 format)
backend.test_genres_endpoint: PASSED - Returns genre dict with name and subgenres
backend.test_locations_endpoint: PASSED - Returns location list with name, cost_per_day, category
backend.test_response_times: PASSED - All endpoints respond within acceptable time with network latency

frontend.dashboard_page: PASSED - Shows stats (22 Films, $105M Revenue, 73% Quality), financial overview, action cards, film posters
frontend.film_pipeline_page: PASSED - Shows creation form with title input, genre select, step indicator
frontend.cineboard_page: PASSED - Shows 4 tabs (Giornaliera, Settimanale, In Sala, Affluenze), film rankings with trend bars, scores

features_verified: GET /api/dashboard/batch returns all dashboard data in one call (stats, featured_films, challenges, pending_revenue, etc.)
Dashboard page loads correctly using batch endpoint - shows stats, film count, revenue, financial data
GET /api/cineboard/daily returns films with hourly trend data (6 blocks: 0-4h, 4-8h, etc.)
GET /api/cineboard/weekly returns films with G1-G7 trend bars
GET /api/cineboard/now-playing returns top 50 films with ranking and scores
Film Pipeline page loads correctly - creation tab with genres/locations
Film Pipeline tabs work (creation, proposals, casting visible in UI)
Backend starts without errors after index creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimizations verified: 1) Dashboard batch endpoint consolidates 13+ API calls into 1 - returns stats, featured_films, challenges, pending_revenue, pending_films, emerging_count, has_studio, shooting_films, pipeline_counts. 2) CineBoard endpoints use TTLCache with 30s TTL and query projections. 3) Frontend uses cachedGet with 2-minute TTL and request deduplication. Test user has 22 films with $105M total revenue.
